creator: msoulier@digitaltorque.ca
text:
I ran portupgrade -ai, and came across the python upgrade from 2.4 to 2.5.
    After performing it as suggested in UPDATING (portupgrade -o lang/python25
    lang/python24), I ran upgrade-site-packages as specified. When it came to
    mod_python, it failed as it was unable to find the right tarball anywhere. 

    I tried to get it from ftp.freebsd.org, but that version of the tarball
    didn't match the md5 sum specified in the port. I finally grabbed it
    myself from the mod_python website, put it into distfiles, and built the
    port.

Fix: 

Get the right tarball from the mod_python website.
How-To-Repeat:     portupgrade -f mod_python
